author: PC Gamer
text:
To get Thief Remastered's cutscenes right, Nightdive brought on the dev behind the 1998 originals
Dan Thron is in the house.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Palworld 1.0 update has '27 pdf pages of changes and additions,' says publishing lead
"Losing my mind trying to make nice patch notes for Palworld 1.0…"

author: PC Gamer
text:
Riot delays 'last hit indicators' in League of Legends ranked mode after fan response: 'We want to get more data and feedback'
"We’ll keep them enabled, but off by default, for swiftplay, co-op vs AI, and normal draft."

author: PC Gamer
text:
Discussion time: Most big MMOs are seasonal now—do you prefer it that way, or do you loathe the FOMO checklist?
'Tis the season.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Web port wizards produce browser versions of Half-Life 2 and Portal
The right game in the wrong window can make all the difference in the world.

author: PC Gamer
text:
I tried to create the perfect zombie apocalypse in this intensely detailed outbreak simulator, and sorry slow zombie fans, fast zombies are just better
"It's the game I wanted to play but couldn't because it didn't exist, so I made it."

author: PC Gamer
text:
A series of surprise updates has polished Path of Exile 2 into a juggernaut that's about to shake up the action RPG genre later this year
Grinding Gear Games is putting in the work to prepare for the game's 1.0 release.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Riot teases League of Legends Classic, with a full reveal coming in two weeks
"Is it season one? Is it season four?"

author: PC Gamer
text:
Super Earth's finest, can you identify these Helldivers 2 Stratagems using just their codes?
Prove your proficiency, Diver.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Not content with a Nightdive remaster, Thief's also getting a graphic novel and an original soundtrack featuring Garrett's voice actor
Thief: Pulse of Promise is set between the first two games.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Helldivers 2's next warbond is delayed, as Arrowhead says it 'needs more time to cook' following the shooter's massive progression rework
"We will provide more information as it nears completion."

author: PC Gamer
text:
The next game from the director of Blood West is a frozen survival shooter where you scratch a living off the decaying corpse of a god
Bloodwoven gives eldritch horror an arctic spin.

author: PC Gamer
text:
The game formerly known as Operation Flashpoint is getting a remaster, while developer Bohemia Interactive has released its engine source code
Arma: Cold War Assault gets the GitHub treatment.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Windows 10 gets yet another year of life as Microsoft extends security updates into 2027
Vive la Windows 10!

author: PC Gamer
text:
I picked out 31 must-play games going for $5 or less in the Steam Summer Sale
'Bout a hundo if you want them all.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Steam Machine preorder emails are in the wild, and it finally feels real: Valve is actually gonna release this thing in 2026
Did you get one?

author: PC Gamer
text:
Embark switches up Arc Raiders expeditions again, and this time it's giving away paid currency and precious blueprints
A stop gap before what sounds like larger changes to expeditions.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Meccha Chameleon review
It's wrapped in clumsy software, but it's a must-play multiplayer concept.

author: PC Gamer
text:
As its much newer sequel struggles, the 13-year-old Payday 2 is getting a 'massive engine upgrade' that improves performance and cuts the install size in half
The studio that took over Payday 2 development in 2025 has been hard at work.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Rockstar's decision to make GTA 6 fully digital is a terrible, anti-consumer move that makes me worry about the future of videogames
An increasing digital landscape shouldn't erase physical media entirely.
